Mentions Timeline (18 articles)
3303-05-25
Galactic News The Gnosis Takes Flight
The Gnosis, a scientific-research vessel commissioned by the Canonn Interstellar Research Group, has begun its maiden voyage and is now orbiting Varati A6.

Freelance Report Detail of Dr Arcanonn Death Threats Revealed
3302-01-20
More Starports Fall Victim to Technological Plague
3302-01-04
Services Suspended at Gabriel Enterprise
3301-12-04
The Canonn Calls for Halt to Artefact Sales
Dr Arcanonn of the Canonn Interstellar Research Group urges pilots to stop selling Unknown Artefacts, citing a strong correlation between UA sales and station malfunctions at locations including Bond Hub in Varati.
3301-11-26
CIRG Sends Scientists to Bond Hub
3301-11-25
Services Suspended at Gaiman Dock and Weyn Dock
3301-11-19
More Malfunction Reports
3301-11-02
Trouble in Varati
Bond Hub in Varati reports technical malfunctions and power failures similar to those affecting 64 Arietis, Warkushanui and Weyn Dock, as the wave of mysterious station problems continues to spread.
3301-10-29
CIRG Researcher Addresses Artefact Developments
3301-10-01
